queue.label: Create full usePollingFetch hook with dedup, retry, and visibility
queue.prompt: Create ~/Projects/command-center/src/hooks/usePollingFetch.js. Create the hooks directory if needed. Full implementation: function usePollingFetch(url, interval, options={}) where options has { transform, retry: 2, onError, enabled: true, deps: [] }. Returns { data, error, isLoading, isRefreshing, lastUpdated, refetch }. Use useEffect with setTimeout-based scheduling (not setInterval). Use AbortController for deduplication. Skip fetch when document.hidden. Retry failed fetches up to 2 times with exponential backoff. Keep stale data on error. Auto-cleanup on unmount. refetch is a stable useCallback. After creating the file, run `npm run build` from ~/Projects/command-center/ and verify zero errors.

queue.label: Replace Kanban with auto-populated Queue Board (single source of truth)
queue.prompt:
Complete rewrite of the Kanban board in ~/Projects/command-center/src/components/widgets/Kanban.jsx. The old Kanban with manual card entry is being scrapped entirely. The new Kanban reads from the work queue API (http://localhost:8089/api/queue) and displays the auto-builder's pipeline as a visual board. The Queue API server (queue-api.py on port 8089) is already running and handles GET (list queue) and PATCH /api/queue/<id> (update item status).

Requirements:

1. COLUMNS (map queue status to board columns):
   - 'waiting' → 'To Do'
   - 'in_progress' → 'Working'
   - 'done' → 'Completed'
   - 'failed', 'paused' → 'Blocked'

2. DATA SOURCE: Fetch from http://localhost:8089/api/queue on mount and every 15s. Use usePollingFetch from src/hooks/usePollingFetch.js with a 15s poll interval and no retry. Display each item's label as the card title.

3. CARDS: Each card displays:
   - Queue item 'label' as the card title (not 'id')
   - Model badge (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514' shown as a small colored tag)
   - No title/description/tags/due fields from the old Kanban

4. DRAG AND DROP (USE @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable):
   - Import DndContext, DragOverlay, useDroppable, useSortable, closestCorners
   - PointerSensor with 6px activation distance, TouchSensor with 250ms/8px
   - Each column is a Droppable with a SortableContext
   - Each card is Sortable
   - DragOverlay shows a semi-transparent card clone while dragging
   - On drag end: send PATCH to http://localhost:8089/api/queue/<id> with body {'status': new_status}
   - New status mapping: 'To Do'→'waiting', 'Working'→'in_progress', 'Completed'→'done', 'Blocked'→'paused'
   - Handle PATCH errors gracefully (show brief toast/console.warn, don't crash)

5. REMOVE:
   - No CardEditor modal (no add button, no edit form, no title/description/tags/due inputs)
   - No module-level drag state (activeDrag, getDropTarget, startDragFromIndex)
   - Remove any existing Kanban CSS related to the old card editor form

6. LAYOUT: The board should fit within the widget container. Cards should be compact (no excess padding). Use CSS flexbox/grid within the widget. No external styling library.
